image.title: NAJH Nuñez, JA Porcel, J Pijoan, L Batalla, J Teixidor, E Guerra-Farfan, J Minguell

item.title: Rethinking Trauma Hospital Services in one of Spain's Largest University Hospitals during the COVID-19 pandemic. How can we organize and help? Our experience.
